NOTIFICATIONS.DESCRIPTION: Choose how Patra alerts you via Telegram when loads, cashouts, or escalations need attention.

SETUP_STEPS.TITLE: Setup (2 minutes)
SETUP_STEPS.STEP_1: 1. Open Telegram, search @BotFather, send /newbot. Give your bot a name. Copy the bot token it gives you.
SETUP_STEPS.STEP_2: 2. Create a new Telegram group. Add your bot. Promote the bot to admin (no permissions needed, just admin status).
SETUP_STEPS.STEP_3: 3. Send /start in the group. Then visit https://api.telegram.org/bot<YOUR_TOKEN>/getUpdates and find the chat ID (negative number).
SETUP_STEPS.STEP_4: 4. Paste both below and click Test Connection.

FORM.EVENT_LOAD_SUCCESS_DESC: Alert when a player load completes successfully
FORM.EVENT_LOAD_FAILED_DESC: Alert when a load attempt fails
FORM.EVENT_CASHOUT_REQUEST_DESC: New cashout requests to your Telegram group
FORM.EVENT_CASHOUT_FAILED_DESC: Alert when a cashout attempt fails
FORM.EVENT_HUMAN_ESCALATION_DESC: When Patra AI flags a conversation for human review
FORM.EVENT_API_ERROR_DESC: When a game integration or API call fails
FORM.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to disconnect Telegram? You'll stop receiving alerts.

RESULT.TEST_SENT: Test message sent. Check your Telegram group.
